title: Dropdown component with React and TypeScript
purpose: Provides a reusable dropdown UI component with customizable options, labels, and validation.
module_context: Exports a React functional component named Dropdown that accepts various props for configuration including options, labels, placeholders, and event handlers.

steps.content: Generate a unique ID for the component instance.
Set up IDs for the label and description elements.
Initialize internal state with the default value or empty string.
Update internal state when the default value prop changes.
Define the change handler to update internal state and notify parent of changes.
Render the label and select element with appropriate attributes and options.
